description_long: This object is a compact, tactical firearm with a long cylindrical barrel fitted with a suppressor at the front. The main body is sleek and metallic, featuring a dark finish with a wooden or polymer grip that appears ergonomically shaped for handling. A distinctive folding wire stock extends from the rear, designed for shoulder support and stability, and it is constructed from metal rods with a bent end for secure placement. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible, with the guard being rounded and proportionate to the grip. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external attachments aside from the suppressor and stock. The object is built for portability and ease of use in urban environments, with a focus on compactness and tactical utility.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a suppressor, ergonomic grip, and folding wire stock, finished in dark metal and wood. Designed for portability and stability in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the suppressor, ergonomic grip, and extended folding wire stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the suppressor, grip, and the wire stock from the other side, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wire stock's bent end and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with attached suppressor, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
